title: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
description: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.
content:
The US Department of Defence plans to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany, amid a spat between US President Donald Trump and German Chancellor Friedrich Merz over the war with Iran.
The decision comes a day after Trump criticised Merz, who suggested t... [3447 chars]

title: Peter Kay show stopped and 19-year-old in custody after ‘suspicious bag’ found
description: Comedian pulled from stage in Birmingham about 45 minutes into performance and audience told to leave
content:
A live show by comedian Peter Kay in Birmingham has been stopped after a “potential suspicious bag” was found around the venue.
The Utilita Arena Birmingham was evacuated and a 19-year-old man was taken into custody, West Midlands police said on Frid... [1573 chars]

title: Who shot a Secret Service officer at the Trump press dinner?
description: Court papers do not explicitly accuse the suspect of shooting the officer, even as officials say it was not "friendly fire".
content:
Nearly a week after a suspect allegedly tried to assassinate President Donald Trump at a press gala, key details about the shooting remain unclear.

title: Miami Grand Prix: Lando Norris on pole for sprint race ahead of Kimi Antonelli
description: McLaren's Lando Norris becomes the first driver to beat a Mercedes in qualifying this year with sprint pole at the Miami Grand Prix.
content:
McLaren's Lando Norris became the first driver to beat a Mercedes in qualifying this year with sprint pole at the Miami Grand Prix.
The world champion beat Kimi Antonelli by 0.222 seconds with the second McLaren of Oscar Piastri third fastest.

title: Pentagon says US military will be an 'AI-first' fighting force
description: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
content:
The US military plans to increase its use of artificial intelligence (AI) further after the Pentagon agreedto new and expanded contracts with some of the biggest names in technology.
